scripts.dev:infra: node scripts/docker-compose.mjs up && npm run seed
scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && npx concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent -c blue,cyan,green "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent,mcp -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:lowmem: npm run dev:infra && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent -c blue,cyan,green "npm run dev:ui:webpack" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/agent && py -3 -m uv run langgraph dev --port 8133 --no-browser
